widgets.title: Network Discovery Credential Management
widgets.extra_filter: (type in ['snmp-cred','ssh-cred','device-snmp-v1v2','device-snmp-v3'] and customerTag is '{{CUST_TAG}}') or (type in ['snmp-cred','ssh-cred','device-snmp-v1v2','device-snmp-v3'] and (customerTag is empty or customerTag is 'None'))
widgets.extra_filter1: type in ['snmp-cred','ssh-cred'] and (customerTag is '{{CUST_TAG}}' or customerTag is empty)

widgets.title: Discovery
widgets.extra_filter: customer_tag is '{{CUST_TAG}}' or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is 'None'

discovery_scope.title: Discovery
discovery_scope.htmlTemplateForRow: {% raw %} {{ row.discovery_scope_text }} {% endraw %}

formFieldList.label: Add it to discovery?

CSV file format.The file should contain device_ip, discovery_scope.
formFieldList.label: NOTE: Required headers in CSV file: device_ip, discovery_scope

Readonly field. Name of device to be deleted.

onboarding_status.htmlTemplateForRow: {% raw %} {{ row.onboarding_status }} {% endraw %}

widget.title: Select Devices
widget.extra_filter: protocol is 'SNMP' and auth_state is 'Success' and (customer_tag contains '{{CUST_TAG}}' or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is 'None')

widgets.title: Collection Blueprint
widgets.extra_filter: (name contains 'Collection Blueprint' and name contains '{{CUST_TAG}}') or (name contains 'Collection Blueprint')
